author_rating_explanation: Both first author Shanhui Zhao and last author Yuanchun Li are affiliated with Tsinghua University, Peking University, and the University of Hong Kong. These are all top-tier Chinese/Hong Kong AI institutions in the 6-8 score band, with Tsinghua and Peking being among the most elite.
